files.title: cover letter
files.full_text:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the Associate Trainee position at Stratacent. I am currently a final-year B.Tech student in Information Technology at JSS Academy of Technical Education and have developed strong skills in backend development, cloud technologies, and software engineering through internships and personal projects.

During my internships, I worked extensively on building scalable backend systems using Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB. I developed multiple RESTful APIs, implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based access control, and optimized backend workflows to improve system performance and reliability. I also built real-time systems using WebSockets and integrated backend services with mobile applications used by active users.

In addition to my professional experience, I have a strong foundation in computer science fundamentals including Operating Systems, DBMS, and Computer Networks. I actively practice problem-solving and have solved 500+ data structures and algorithms problems across platforms like LeetCode and Codeforces, which has strengthened my understanding of algorithmic thinking and software design.

I am particularly excited about the opportunity at Stratacent because of its focus on cloud technologies, modern application development, and global delivery for enterprise clients. I am eager to contribute my backend development skills while continuing to learn about cloud platforms, distributed systems, and scalable architectures.

I would welcome the opportunity to contribute to your engineering team and grow as part of Stratacent’s innovative technical environment.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Devesh Rajput
9368743581
[r.rajput12111@gmail.com](mailto:r.rajput12111@gmail.com)
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/devesh2904

files.name: res (18).pdf
files.summary: Professional resume of Devesh Rajput, a Full Stack Intern and B.Tech student (2022-2026). Highlights experience at Jabsz Studios (React Native, Socket.io) and Gneiss Industries (REST APIs), alongside projects like TunnelX (Distributed Proxy) and PrepAI-Assistant. Skills include React.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and AWS.
files.title: Resume - Devesh Rajput
files.full_text:
Devesh Rajput
9368743581 | r.rajput12111@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/devesh2904 | Portfolio | github.com/Devesh-x | leetcode
Experience
Jabsz Studios July 2025 - Dec 2025
Full Stack Intern
– Developed and deployed user-facing features using React Native, collaborating with the design team to
translate UI/UX designs into functional, high-performance mobile applications.
– Wrote clean, well-documented, and efficient code; participated in code reviews to maintain code quality
following SOLID principles and agile workflows.
– Built and debugged real-time multiplayer features using Socket.io across 6 games, resolving cross-device issues
and improving user experience for 100+ active users.
– Handled asynchronous data handling by integrating RESTful APIs with the frontend client, improving data
consistency and app responsiveness.
Gneiss Industries Pvt. Ltd. April 2025 - June 2025
Software Engineer Intern
– Developed 20+ RESTful API endpoints in an agile, collaborative environment and integrated them with
frontend dashboards, improving workflow automation and web performance.
– Participated in code reviews and pull requests; wrote clean, maintainable code and adapted quickly to new
tools and collaborative development workflows.
– Debugged and resolved technical issues across services, improving system performance and operational
reliability.
Projects
TunnelX | Live | GitHub(TypeScript, Node.js, WebSockets, Redis, Docker, PostgreSQL, React.js, CLI Development)
– Built a distributed reverse proxy tunneling system using Node.js and WebSockets to securely expose
localhost services with efficient traffic routing and low-latency communication.
– Developed a production-grade CLI tool for automated tunnel creation, authentication, and session management
— demonstrating clean, scalable, well-tested code with modular TypeScript architecture.
– Engineered high-concurrency backend services using WebSocket connection multiplexing, reducing
connection overhead and improving system throughput at scale.
– Implemented distributed state management using Redis for session storage and tunnel lifecycle tracking,
alongside a custom Redis-based rate limiting system using atomic counters for scalable traffic control across
backend instances.
PrepAI-Assistant | Live | GitHub(React.js, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JWT, Gemini API)
– Built a responsive React.js frontend with Tailwind CSS, translating UI/UX designs into clean,
high-performance user-facing screens with state management via React Context API.
– Handled asynchronous data fetching and integrated RESTful APIs for end-to-end LLM-driven AI
functionality, ensuring smooth and consistent user experience.
– Implemented unit and integration tests for frontend components improving code reliability and maintainability
across 25+ modular components.
– Implemented secure token-based authentication and optimized frontend load times through web performance
optimization techniques.
Technical Skills
Frontend: React.js, React Native, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Context
API, State Management, Web Performance Optimization
Testing: Unit Testing, Integration Testing, End-to-End Testing
Backend & APIs: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, WebSockets, Socket.io, JWT Authentication, Asynchronous Data
Handling
Databases & Storage: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, Cloudinary
Cloud & DevOps: AWS (EC2, S3), Docker, CI/CD, Vercel, Render
Tools & CS: Git, GitHub, Postman, Agile Development, Code Reviews, Pull Requests, DSA (500+ LeetCode, 1600+
Rating), SOLID Principles
Achievements & Certifications
– LeetCode Biweekly Contest 175: Ranked 273 among 25,000+ global participants.
– Smart India Hackathon 2023: Runner-Up (Top 15 nationally) — Led 5-member team building India Tourism
Platform with React.js and Node.js for a government problem statement.
Education
Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology JSS Academy of Technical Education
2022 – 2026 Noida, India
